# The Dependency Installer

> npm install but for life — install self-confidence, motivation, and other life packages.

## Tech Stack
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion, canvas-confetti, html2canvas, Web Audio API, Lucide React

## Key Files
- src/App.tsx — Main application component
- src/components/ — UI components (terminal, dependency tree, etc.)
- src/components/NodeModulesTreemap.tsx — Enhanced bundle treemap (18 items)
- src/components/LockfileConflict.tsx — Lockfile conflict simulator
- src/components/ChangelogProTier.tsx — Enhanced changelog and Pro Tier
- src/components/CliMode.tsx — CLI mode interface
- src/data/ — Life packages, vulnerability data, npx commands
- src/hooks/ — Custom React hooks
- src/utils/ — Utility functions

## Features
- Life package installation with realistic progress
- Vulnerability scanner for emotional dependencies
- Dependency tree visualization
- Install failures for impossible packages
- package.json of life generator
- npx life commands
- Achievement system
- Enhanced Bundle Treemap (18 items)
- Lockfile Conflict simulator
- Enhanced Changelog (16 entries)
- Pro Tier with escalating payment failures

## URLs
- Live: https://the-dependency-installer.netlify.app
- Repo: https://github.com/arnoldwender/the-dependency-installer
